name: DELF Certificate
description: Successfully earned the DELF B2 certification, demonstrating an upper-intermediate proficiency in French. This certification reflects strong communication skills in speaking, listening, reading, and writing, as well as the ability to use French effectively in academic and professional contexts.

name: InjazAlmgharib participation Certificate
description: Participated in the INJAZ Al-Maghrib entrepreneurship competition as part of a team, where we developed ARDCenter, an innovative platform designed to support the agricultural sector. The platform featured an AI-powered assistant for agricultural guidance, a marketplace connecting buyers and sellers of agricultural products, and a service that enabled farmers to connect with agricultural experts. This experience strengthened my teamwork, problem-solving, and project development skills while applying technology to address real-world challenges. Our team successfully completed the competition and was awarded a certificate of participation.
